titleStmt.title: SII 24.223: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 223. (A.R. No. 18 of 1936-37.) NORTH WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA, OPPOSITE THE MUDALĀḺVĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Registers a tax-free gift of 700 mā of land to 208 bhaṭṭas colonising the agaram called Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, newly founded and named after the king in Tiruvaraṅgam-Tiruppati in Viḷā-nāḍu, a sub-division of Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu on the southern-bank, and for offerings and worship of god Lakshmīnārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ consecrated in that colony. The record is dated in the 10th year and 184th day of Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān who may be identified with Jaṭāvarman Sundara Pāṇḍya III who is well-known to have had the title Kōdaṇḍarāma. The date of the record thus corresponds to A.D. 1312.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ teṉkarai pāṇṭi kulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nām vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭarāmac caturvetimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukkum Ivvakarattu nāyanār lakṣminārāyaṇapperumāḷ koyilt tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum rāca rāca vaḷanāṭṭu mel kūṟṟil Alakaṟai nāṭṭil cūriya tevanallūrk kaṭṭaḷaiyilum virarājentracoḻa nallūrk kaṭṭaḷaiyilum rājendra coḻanallūrk kaṭṭaḷaiyilum kulottuṅkacoḻanallūrk kaṭṭaḷaiyilum Oṉpatāvatu varaiyum kaḻintu ponta tevatā
ṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantam bhaṭṭarkaḷ Iṟaiyili Aiyyaṉ pātti piṭāri viḷākam tukkai pāttiyum tirunārāyaṇapurattu nāyaṉār vetanāyakapperumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkum Innāyaṉār koyil cūḻnta Akara bhaṭṭarkaḷ Iṟaiyili kkum (m) kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi Uḷḷa nilamum nikki nikki niṉṟa nilattile Innāya ṉārkku Amutu paṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum Uṭalāka paṅku pattukku nilam muppatu māvum bhaṭṭarkaḷ per Irunūṟṟeṭṭukku per Oṉṟukku nilam muṉṟu māvāka nilam Aṟunūṟṟu I
rupattu nālumāvum vedavṛtti nilam paṉṉiraṇṭu māvum purāṇa vṛtti nilam Āṟu māvum vaidyavṛtti nilam muṉṟu māvum yajñabhikṣaikku nilam pattu māvum grāmāṅgamāna pala paṇicey vṛttinilam patiṉaiñcu māvum Āka nilam Eḻunūṟu māvum Innilattāl varum nattamum nattap payirum pattāvatu taimmātam mutal taṅkaḷukkup pūtāṉamākat tantom Iṉṉilam Eḻunūṟu māvum Innāḷ mutal kārum pacānamum maṟṟum koḻuntum Oru pūvum kaṭaippūvum mañcaḷiñci vāḻai kamuku puṉpayir maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa payirkaḷu
m ceytu koṇṭu Aṉubhavittup potavum Innilattāl varum kaṭamai Antarāyam kāriya Ārāycci nelvari ponvari kācu kaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayir maṉai Iṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli tāṭṭārappāṭṭam Ērivari Iṉavari Iṭaivari maṉai vari Oḻukku nīr mīṉ pāṭṭam kāṇikkai kāttikaip paccai pañcu pili Olai Eḻuttu viṉiyokam vācalp peṟu Ilāñciṉaip peṟu Āṉaiccālai kutiraip panti Āḷttāḻvu taricut tāḻvu veṭṭi nirāṇi maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Innāḷ mutal variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻittu muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻam peyarum mutalaṟat tavirttu muta
laṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom . Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu candrādityavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟai yiliyāka Aṉupavittup potuka § Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟuc ceyyāṉa māṉa parākrama pāṇṭiya nallūr Ālainallūruṭaiyāṉ veṇṇeyk kūttaṉāṉa cuntarap pāṇṭiyap pallavarāyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattu naṭuviṟ kūṟṟuk kuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tirumāliruñcolai niṉṟāṉāṉa pallavarāya ṉeḻuttu § yāṇṭu 10 nāḷ 100 8 10 4 2 tulyam § 1 §
Digital edition of SII 24.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
